title: Salarpuria Sattva is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Salarpuria Sattva is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Salarpuria Sattva has an exciting opening for a Senior Property Advisor at our Navi Mumbai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Salarpuria Sattva:
Salarpuria Sattva is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Contract Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Salarpuria Sattva!
